no, I love it.

Cool.

it's light, but I wanted to kind of get your thoughts on that.

Yeah, we can do six months.
Um I know month to month.

Ok.
And any price difference in the two.
Nope, no price difference.
Um Yeah, they're pretty much the same.

If that's a big deal to you, then I would say do a year.

Ok.

under the fees and leasing info on pets, not in that folio anywhere.
